<p>ISLAMABAD: As many as 66 members out of 333 (20 per cent) attended all sittings, while 51 members (15pc) did not attend any sitting, during the 26th session of the National Assembly held between March 30 and April 8.</p>

news.summary: <p>Pakistan’s sales tax system was designed in a value-added mode to collect revenues at every link of the supply chain and document the economy. news.headline: Focus on outflows and inflows
news.summary: <p>Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi has revealed that Pakistani businessmen have moved billions abroad over the past three to four years.
